records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, retriever.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So? Where are we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ugh. Are we still alive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ugh. Are we still alive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ugh. Are we still alive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Swan! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Swan! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Swan! Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, retriever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, retriever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, retriever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that this place was slightly off centered from the pillar of light connecting to the moon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that this place was slightly off centered from the pillar of light connecting to the moon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that this place was slightly off centered from the pillar of light connecting to the moon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're so annoying. Can't you just say "thank you"?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're so annoying. Can't you just say "thank you"?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're so annoying. Can't you just say "thank you"?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? Where are we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? Where are we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? Where are we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did we get swept away by that huge dimensional rift? I really don't want to end up on a missing person's poster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did we get swept away by that huge dimensional rift? I really don't want to end up on a missing person's poster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did we get swept away by that huge dimensional rift? I really don't want to end up on a missing person's poster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. We didn't cross dimensions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. We didn't cross dimensions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. We didn't cross dimensions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's just that the world around us has changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's just that the world around us has changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's just that the world around us has changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, this used to be the Corrupted Area we were in?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, this used to be the Corrupted Area we were in?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, this used to be the Corrupted Area we were in?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look at that hill. The location and topographical characteristics of this place haven't changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look at that hill. The location and topographical characteristics of this place haven't changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at that hill. The location and topographical characteristics of this place haven't changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that the environment around us has changed due to Sephira's influence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that the environment around us has changed due to Sephira's influence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that the environment around us has changed due to Sephira's influence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It takes a long time to recover land exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It takes a long time to recover land exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It takes a long time to recover land exposed to Corruption rays for a long time, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're telling me that this Sephira fully restored the entire natural environment of this place?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're telling me that this Sephira fully restored the entire natural environment of this place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're telling me that this Sephira fully restored the entire natural environment of this place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure if it was restored to its original state, or if it was created anew, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure if it was restored to its original state, or if it was created anew, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure if it was restored to its original state, or if it was created anew, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: that doesn't seem to be all of it, unfortunately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: that doesn't seem to be all of it, unfortunately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: that doesn't seem to be all of it, unfortunately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What was that sound...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What was that sound...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What was that sound...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grr... Grrrrrrr...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grr... Grrrrrrr...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grr... Grrrrrrr...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that...a C.O....?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that...a C.O....?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that...a C.O....?
